info.name: Dharwin Mobile App APIs
info.description:
Full backend coverage for the **Dharwin mobile app** (Expo: `Dharwin App/my-app`).

**Setup:** Set `email` / `password` in collection variables → run **1. Auth → Login** → run any request.

Each **folder** includes: app screen tree (login + 5 tabs + inner routes), mobile workflow, Postman tips, and a table mapping every API to app screen, when to call, backend handler, and purpose.
Each **request** documents: mobile screen, **How to connect in the app** (route, file, service, flow, wiring status), backend route/handler, and auth.

### App navigation map

```
app/index.tsx (splash)
  └─► app/login.tsx ──► Auth APIs ──► app/(tabs)/*
        app/forgot-password.tsx

app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx  — 5 tabs (left → right):
  1. Mails      app/(tabs)/mails.tsx
  2. Chats      app/(tabs)/chats.tsx
  3. Calls      app/(tabs)/calls.tsx
  4. Meetings   app/(tabs)/meetings.tsx
  5. Files      app/(tabs)/files.tsx
```

**Wiring status:** Most screens still use mock data. `services/mail.ts` + `services/api.ts` exist; auth/meetings/chats/files/calls services are planned.

| Area | Tab / entry | Inner screens |
|------|-------------|---------------|
| Auth | `/login` | `/forgot-password` |
| Mails | `/(tabs)/mails` | `/mail/[folder]`, `/mail/thread/[id]`, `/mail/compose`, `/mail/accounts`, `/mail/add-account`, `/mail/settings`, `/mail/create-label` |
| Chats | `/(tabs)/chats` | `/chat/[id]`, `/chat/new` |
| Calls | `/(tabs)/calls` | `/call/new` |
| Meetings | `/(tabs)/meetings` | `/meeting/[id]`, `/meeting/create` |
| Files | `/(tabs)/files` | `/files/category/[id]`, `/files/[id]`, `/files/upload` |

All routes mount under `/v1` (included in `baseUrl`). Source: `uat.dharwin.backend/src/routes/v1/`.

| Mobile tab | Postman folder | Backend prefix |
|------------|----------------|----------------|
| Sign in | 1. Auth | `/auth` |
| Mails | 2–3. Mail | `/email`, `/outlook` |
| Meetings | 4. Internal Meetings | `/internal-meetings` |
| LiveKit | 5. LiveKit | `/livekit` |
| Recordings | 6. Recordings | `/recordings` |
| Files | 7. File Storage | `/file-storage` |
| Chats | 8. Chats | `/chats` |
| Calls | 9. Unified Calls | `/communication` |

request.description:
**API:** `POST /auth/login`

### Mobile app
login.tsx — Sign in (not wired yet; mock navigation today)

### How to connect in the app
- **Screen route:** `/login`
- **File:** `app/login.tsx`
- **Service:** services/auth.ts (planned)
- **When to call:** User taps **Sign in** after entering email + password
- **Navigation flow:** index (splash) → login → **Login** → store tokens → **Me** → router.replace("/(tabs)/…")
- **From → To:** app/index.tsx → app/(tabs)/*
- **Wiring status:** Not wired — mock navigates to /chats without API

### Backend (uat.dharwin.backend)
- **Route file:** `src/routes/v1/auth.route.js`
- **Handler:** `authController.login`
- **What it does:** Authenticates email/password, sets HttpOnly auth cookies, and may return access/refresh tokens in JSON when AUTH_RETURN_TOKENS_IN_JSON is enabled.
- **How to call:** POST body `{ email, password }`. Rate-limited. No Bearer token. Postman test script saves tokens to collection variables.
- **Auth / permissions:** Public

_App repo: `Dharwin App/my-app`. Auth service scaffold in `services/api.ts`; login screen not yet calling backend._

**API:** `GET /auth/me`

### Mobile app
Session bootstrap after login (planned; no caller yet)

### How to connect in the app
- **Screen route:** `/ (bootstrap) or tabs`
- **File:** `app/_layout.tsx / services/api.ts (planned)`
- **Service:** services/auth.ts → getMe()
- **When to call:** Immediately after Login; also on cold start if refresh token valid
- **Navigation flow:** Login success → **Me** → hydrate user, roles, feature flags → render tabs
- **From → To:** login.tsx or app bootstrap → All tabs (permission-gated UI)
- **Wiring status:** Not wired

### Backend (uat.dharwin.backend)
- **Route file:** `src/routes/v1/auth.route.js`
- **Handler:** `authController.getMe`
- **What it does:** Returns the authenticated user profile, sessions, feature flags, and optional impersonation context.
- **How to call:** GET with Bearer `accessToken`. Resigned candidate/employee accounts receive 403 (CANDIDATE_RESIGNED).
- **Auth / permissions:** Bearer JWT

_App repo: `Dharwin App/my-app`. Auth service scaffold in `services/api.ts`; login screen not yet calling backend._

**API:** `POST /auth/refresh-tokens`

### Mobile app
services/api.ts — silent token refresh (planned)

### How to connect in the app
- **Screen route:** `(global)`
- **File:** `services/api.ts`
- **Service:** services/api.ts — axios/fetch interceptor
- **When to call:** Any API returns 401; before retrying the failed request
- **Navigation flow:** API 401 → **Refresh Tokens** → update accessToken → retry original call
- **From → To:** Any authenticated screen → Same screen (transparent retry)
- **Wiring status:** Not wired

### Backend (uat.dharwin.backend)
- **Route file:** `src/routes/v1/auth.route.js`
- **Handler:** `authController.refreshTokens`
- **What it does:** Exchanges a valid refresh token for new access/refresh tokens and refreshes auth cookies.
- **How to call:** POST body `{ refreshToken }` or rely on refreshToken HttpOnly cookie.
- **Auth / permissions:** Valid refresh token (no access token required)

_App repo: `Dharwin App/my-app`. Auth service scaffold in `services/api.ts`; login screen not yet calling backend._

**API:** `POST /auth/logout`

### Mobile app
mail/accounts.tsx — Sign out of all accounts (planned)

### How to connect in the app
- **Screen route:** `/mail/accounts`
- **File:** `app/mail/accounts.tsx`
- **Service:** services/auth.ts → logout()
- **When to call:** User taps **Sign out** on accounts screen
- **Navigation flow:** accounts → **Logout** → clear secure storage → router.replace("/login")
- **From → To:** mail/accounts (also reachable from mails tab sidebar) → app/login.tsx
- **Wiring status:** Not wired

### Backend (uat.dharwin.backend)
- **Route file:** `src/routes/v1/auth.route.js`
- **Handler:** `authController.logout`
- **What it does:** Revokes the refresh token, clears auth cookies, and logs sign-out activity.
- **How to call:** POST body `{ refreshToken }`. Returns 204.
- **Auth / permissions:** Refresh token in body or cookie

_App repo: `Dharwin App/my-app`. Auth service scaffold in `services/api.ts`; login screen not yet calling backend._

item.description:
## 1. Auth

JWT authentication for the mobile app. All other folders require a valid `accessToken` (Bearer) except Login and Refresh Tokens.

**Mobile tab:** Sign in (pre-tabs)
**App routes:** `app/login.tsx`, `services/api.ts`, `services/auth.ts` (planned)

### App screens & inner routes

**Login & session (pre-tabs)**
- `app/index.tsx` → splash → navigates to `/login`
- `app/login.tsx` (`/login`) → **Login**, then **Me** → enter tabs
- `app/forgot-password.tsx` → UI only (no Postman API yet)
- `services/api.ts` → **Refresh Tokens** on 401 (interceptor, planned)
- `app/mail/accounts.tsx` → **Logout** on sign-out

### How to use in the mobile app
- User enters email/password on **login.tsx** → call **Login** → store `accessToken` + `refreshToken` in secure storage.
- On app launch, call **Me** to hydrate user profile and permissions.
- When API returns 401, call **Refresh Tokens** then retry the failed request.
- On sign-out from **mail/accounts.tsx**, call **Logout** and clear local tokens.

### Postman testing
- Set collection variables `email` and `password`.
- Run **Login** — test script saves tokens to `accessToken` / `refreshToken`.
- All other requests inherit Bearer auth from collection level.

### APIs in this folder

| Request | API | App screen | When to call | Backend handler | What it does |
|---------|-----|------------|--------------|-----------------|--------------|
| Login | `POST /auth/login` | /login (app/login.tsx) | User taps **Sign in** after entering email + password | `authController.login` | Authenticates email/password, sets HttpOnly auth cookies, and may return access/refresh tokens in JSON when AUTH_RETURN_TOKENS_IN_JSON is enabled. |
| Me (current user) | `GET /auth/me` | / (bootstrap) or tabs (app/_layout.tsx / services/api.ts (planned)) | Immediately after Login; also on cold start if refresh token valid | `authController.getMe` | Returns the authenticated user profile, sessions, feature flags, and optional impersonation context. |
| Refresh Tokens | `POST /auth/refresh-tokens` | (global) (services/api.ts) | Any API returns 401; before retrying the failed request | `authController.refreshTokens` | Exchanges a valid refresh token for new access/refresh tokens and refreshes auth cookies. |
| Logout | `POST /auth/logout` | /mail/accounts (app/mail/accounts.tsx) | User taps **Sign out** on accounts screen | `authController.logout` | Revokes the refresh token, clears auth cookies, and logs sign-out activity. |

### Backend route files
- `src/routes/v1/auth.route.js`

request.description:
**API:** `GET /email/accounts`

### Mobile app
mail/accounts.tsx, mail/add-account.tsx, (tabs)/mails.tsx account switcher

### How to connect in the app
- **Screen route:** `/(tabs)/mails | /mail/accounts`
- **File:** `app/(tabs)/mails.tsx, app/mail/accounts.tsx`
- **Service:** services/mail.ts → listAccounts("gmail")
- **When to call:** Mails tab mount; accounts screen open; after OAuth connect
- **Navigation flow:** Tab load → **GET Accounts** → populate switcher → save accountId
- **From → To:** Tab bar Mails → mail/[folder], thread, compose
- **Wiring status:** Service ready; screens use mock

### Backend (uat.dharwin.backend)
- **Route file:** `src/routes/v1/email.route.js`
- **Handler:** `emailController.listGmailAccounts`
- **What it does:** Lists Gmail accounts linked to the authenticated user.
- **How to call:** GET, no params. Saves first account id to `accountId` via Postman test script.
- **Auth / permissions:** Bearer JWT + emails.read

_App repo: `Dharwin App/my-app`. Mail client in `services/mail.ts`; most mail screens still use mock data until wired._

**API:** `GET /email/auth/google`

### Mobile app
mail/add-account.tsx — Connect Gmail

### How to connect in the app
- **Screen route:** `/mail/add-account`
- **File:** `app/mail/add-account.tsx`
- **Service:** services/mail.ts → getOAuthUrl("gmail")
- **When to call:** User taps **Connect Gmail**
- **Navigation flow:** add-account → **OAuth Start** → open browser URL → user consents
- **From → To:** mail/accounts or sidebar → OAuth callback deep link
- **Wiring status:** Service ready; deep link handler not built

### Backend (uat.dharwin.backend)
- **Route file:** `src/routes/v1/email.route.js`
- **Handler:** `emailController.getGoogleAuthUrl`
- **What it does:** Returns a Google OAuth authorization URL to connect a Gmail mailbox.
- **How to call:** GET with Bearer. Open returned `{ url }` in browser; completes via callback route.
- **Auth / permissions:** Bearer JWT + emails.manage

_App repo: `Dharwin App/my-app`. Mail client in `services/mail.ts`; most mail screens still use mock data until wired._

**API:** `GET /email/auth/google/callback`

### Mobile app
Deep link dharwin:// after Google OAuth (handler not implemented)

### How to connect in the app
- **Screen route:** `dharwin://oauth/google (planned)`
- **File:** `app/_layout.tsx deep-link handler (planned)`
- **Service:** Handled server-side; app receives redirect
- **When to call:** After Google redirects back to app
- **Navigation flow:** Browser callback → backend stores tokens → deep link → **GET Accounts**
- **From → To:** External browser → mail/add-account or mails tab
- **Wiring status:** Not implemented

### Backend (uat.dharwin.backend)
- **Route file:** `src/routes/v1/email.route.js`
- **Handler:** `emailController.googleCallback`
- **What it does:** Handles Google OAuth redirect, stores tokens, redirects to frontend with success/error query params.
- **How to call:** Browser redirect from Google with `code` and `state` (state encodes userId). Not called from mobile directly.
- **Auth / permissions:** OAuth callback (no Bearer)

_App repo: `Dharwin App/my-app`. Mail client in `services/mail.ts`; most mail screens still use mock data until wired._

**API:** `DELETE /email/accounts/{{accountId}}`

### Mobile app
mail/add-account.tsx — Revoke Gmail account

### How to connect in the app
- **Screen route:** `/mail/add-account`
- **File:** `app/mail/add-account.tsx`
- **Service:** services/mail.ts → revokeAccount("gmail", id)
- **When to call:** User revokes/disconnects a Gmail account
- **Navigation flow:** add-account → confirm → **DELETE Account** → refresh list
- **From → To:** mail/accounts, add-account → Same screen (updated list)
- **Wiring status:** Service ready; UI mock

### Backend (uat.dharwin.backend)
- **Route file:** `src/routes/v1/email.route.js`
- **Handler:** `emailController.disconnectGmailAccount`
- **What it does:** Disconnects/revokes a linked Gmail account for the current user.
- **How to call:** DELETE `/email/accounts/:accountId` — Mongo ObjectId path param.
- **Auth / permissions:** Bearer JWT + emails.manage

_App repo: `Dharwin App/my-app`. Mail client in `services/mail.ts`; most mail screens still use mock data until wired._

**API:** `GET /email/threads`

### Mobile app
(tabs)/mails.tsx, mail/[folder].tsx — Inbox & folder lists

### How to connect in the app
- **Screen route:** `/(tabs)/mails | /mail/[folder]`
- **File:** `app/(tabs)/mails.tsx, app/mail/[folder].tsx`
- **Service:** services/mail.ts → listThreads("gmail", { accountId, labelId, q })
- **When to call:** Tab/folder mount, pull-to-refresh, search, infinite scroll
- **Navigation flow:** Select account + folder → **List Threads** → render rows
- **From → To:** Mails tab, sidebar folder tap → mail/thread/[id]
- **Wiring status:** Service ready; screens use mock

### Backend (uat.dharwin.backend)
- **Route file:** `src/routes/v1/email.route.js`
- **Handler:** `emailController.listThreads`
- **What it does:** Lists Gmail threads for an account, optionally filtered by label and search query.
- **How to call:** Query: `accountId` (required), `labelId?`, `pageToken?`, `pageSize?` (default 20), `q?`.
- **Auth / permissions:** Bearer JWT + emails.read

_App repo: `Dharwin App/my-app`. Mail client in `services/mail.ts`; most mail screens still use mock data until wired._

**API:** `GET /email/threads/{{threadId}}`

### Mobile app

- **From → To:** mails tab, mail/[folder] → mail/compose?mode=reply
- **Wiring status:** Mock data (getMailThreadDetail)

### Backend (uat.dharwin.backend)
- **Route file:** `src/routes/v1/email.route.js`
- **Handler:** `emailController.getThread`
- **What it does:** Fetches a single Gmail thread with its messages.
- **How to call:** Path `threadId`. Query `accountId` (required).
- **Auth / permissions:** Bearer JWT + emails.read

_App repo: `Dharwin App/my-app`. Mail client in `services/mail.ts`; most mail screens still use mock data until wired._

_App repo: `Dharwin App/my-app`. Mail client in `services/mail.ts`; most mail screens still use mock data until wired._

- **How to call:** Body: `{ accountId, to, cc?, bcc?, subject?, html, attachments? }`. Backend expects `html`, not `body`.
- **Auth / permissions:** Bearer JWT + emails.manage

_App repo: `Dharwin App/my-app`. Mail client in `services/mail.ts`; most mail screens still use mock data until wired._

**API:** `POST /email/messages/{{messageId}}/reply`

item.description:
## 2. Mail - Gmail

Gmail integration via connected accounts. Provider prefix: `/email/*`. Mail API client lives in `services/mail.ts`.

**Mobile tab:** Mails
**App routes:** `app/(tabs)/mails.tsx`, `app/mail/*` (thread, compose, accounts, settings)

### App screens & inner routes

**Tab:** `app/(tabs)/mails.tsx` → account switcher, recent threads

**Inner screens**
| Route | File | APIs to wire |
|-------|------|--------------|
| `/mail/[folder]` | `app/mail/[folder].tsx` | List Threads, Labels |
| `/mail/thread/[id]` | `app/mail/thread/[id].tsx` | Thread Detail, Single Message, Patch, Trash, Attachment |
| `/mail/compose` | `app/mail/compose.tsx` | Send, Reply, Reply All, Forward, AI Draft, Templates |
| `/mail/accounts` | `app/mail/accounts.tsx` | GET Accounts |
| `/mail/add-account` | `app/mail/add-account.tsx` | OAuth Start/Callback, DELETE Account |
| `/mail/settings` | `app/mail/settings.tsx` | Signature Get/Patch |
| `/mail/create-label` | `app/mail/create-label.tsx` | Labels (create) |

**Service:** `services/mail.ts` (provider `gmail` → `/email/*`)

### How to use in the mobile app
- **GET Accounts** on Mails tab load → populate account switcher.
- **OAuth - Start Google** opens browser; callback completes account link.
- **List Threads** + **Labels** power inbox and sidebar folders.
- Open thread → **Thread Detail** / **Single Message**; reply → **Reply** / **Send Message** via compose.
- **Patch Message**, **Trash Thread**, **Get Attachment** from thread actions.

### Postman testing
- Run **GET Accounts** after login — saves `accountId` to collection variables.
- Use `accountId` in thread/list/send requests.
- OAuth requests are browser-based; use mobile deep link in production.

### APIs in this folder

| Request | API | App screen | When to call | Backend handler | What it does |
|---------|-----|------------|--------------|-----------------|--------------|
| GET Accounts | `GET /email/accounts` | /(tabs)/mails \| /mail/accounts (app/(tabs)/mails.tsx, app/mail/accounts.tsx) | Mails tab mount; accounts screen open; after OAuth connect | `emailController.listGmailAccounts` | Lists Gmail accounts linked to the authenticated user. |
| OAuth - Start Google | `GET /email/auth/google` | /mail/add-account (app/mail/add-account.tsx) | User taps **Connect Gmail** | `emailController.getGoogleAuthUrl` | Returns a Google OAuth authorization URL to connect a Gmail mailbox. |
| OAuth - Google Callback | `GET /email/auth/google/callback` | dharwin://oauth/google (planned) (app/_layout.tsx deep-link handler (planned)) | After Google redirects back to app | `emailController.googleCallback` | Handles Google OAuth redirect, stores tokens, redirects to frontend with success/error query params. |
| DELETE Account | `DELETE /email/accounts/{{accountId}}` | /mail/add-account (app/mail/add-account.tsx) | User revokes/disconnects a Gmail account | `emailController.disconnectGmailAccount` | Disconnects/revokes a linked Gmail account for the current user. |
| List Threads | `GET /email/threads` | /(tabs)/mails \| /mail/[folder] (app/(tabs)/mails.tsx, app/mail/[folder].tsx) | Tab/folder mount, pull-to-refresh, search, infinite scroll | `emailController.listThreads` | Lists Gmail threads for an account, optionally filtered by label and search query. |
| Thread Detail | `GET /email/threads/{{threadId}}` | /mail/thread/[id] (app/mail/thread/[id].tsx) | User opens a thread from list | `emailController.getThread` | Fetches a single Gmail thread with its messages. |
| Single Message | `GET /email/messages/{{messageId}}` | /mail/thread/[id] (app/mail/thread/[id].tsx) | Expand single message or load body on demand | `emailController.getMessage` | Fetches one Gmail message by provider message ID. |
| Send Message | `POST /email/messages/send` | /mail/compose (app/mail/compose.tsx) | User taps **Send** on new compose | `emailController.sendMessage` | Sends a new email via the linked Gmail account. |
| Reply | `POST /email/messages/{{messageId}}/reply` | /mail/compose?mode=reply (app/mail/compose.tsx) | Send on reply compose | `emailController.replyMessage` | Replies to a Gmail message. |
| Reply All | `POST /email/messages/{{messageId}}/reply-all` | /mail/compose?mode=replyAll (app/mail/compose.tsx) | Send on reply-all compose | `emailController.replyAllMessage` | Reply-all to a Gmail message. |
| Forward | `POST /email/messages/{{messageId}}/forward` | /mail/compose?mode=forward (app/mail/compose.tsx) | Send on forward compose | `emailController.forwardMessage` | Forwards a Gmail message to new recipients. |
| Patch Message (labels/read) | `PATCH /email/messages/{{messageId}}` | /mail/thread/[id] (app/mail/thread/[id].tsx) | Star, mark read/unread, archive from thread toolbar | `emailController.modifyMessage` | Adds/removes Gmail labels on a message (e.g. mark read by removing UNREAD). |
| Batch Modify Messages | `POST /email/messages/batch-modify` | (none) (—) | Future bulk select in folder view | `emailController.batchModifyMessages` | Batch label changes across multiple messages. |
| Trash Thread | `POST /email/threads/trash` | /mail/thread/[id] (app/mail/thread/[id].tsx) | User deletes/moves thread to trash | `emailController.trashThreads` | Moves one or more threads to Gmail trash. |
| Get Attachment | `GET /email/messages/{{messageId}}/attachments/{{attachmentId}}` | /mail/thread/[id] (app/mail/thread/[id].tsx) | User taps attachment chip | `emailController.getAttachment` | Downloads a Gmail message attachment as raw binary. |
| Labels | `GET /email/labels` | /mail/[folder] + sidebar (components/mail-sidebar.tsx, app/mail/[folder].tsx) | Mails tab load; sidebar open; before folder-specific List Threads | `emailController.listLabels` | Lists Gmail labels/folders for an account. |
| Templates - List | `GET /email/templates` | /mail/compose (app/mail/compose.tsx) | User opens template picker (UI not built) | `emailPreferencesController.listTemplates` | Lists the user's personal email compose templates. |
| Templates - Create | `POST /email/templates` | /mail/compose (app/mail/compose.tsx) | Save current compose as template (planned) | `emailPreferencesController.createTemplate` | Creates a personal email template. |
| Templates - Patch | `PATCH /email/templates/{{templateId}}` | /mail/compose (app/mail/compose.tsx) | Edit existing template (planned) | `emailPreferencesController.updateTemplate` | Updates a personal email template. |
| Signature - Get | `GET /email/signature` | /mail/settings (app/mail/settings.tsx) | Settings screen mount | `emailPreferencesController.getSignature` | Returns the user's email signature (creates default if missing). |
| Signature - Patch | `PATCH /email/signature` | /mail/settings (app/mail/settings.tsx) | User saves signature | `emailPreferencesController.patchSignature` | Updates the user's email signature HTML and/or enabled flag. |
| Drafts - AI Generate | `POST /email/drafts/generate` | /mail/compose (app/mail/compose.tsx) | User taps AI assist / generate draft | `emailController.generateDraft` | Generates AI email draft options via OpenAI. |

### Backend route files
- `src/routes/v1/email.route.js`

item.description:
## 4. Internal Meetings

Schedule and manage Dharwin-native meetings (not external calendar sync). Base path: `/meetings`.

**Mobile tab:** Meetings
**App routes:** `app/(tabs)/meetings.tsx`, `app/meeting/[id].tsx`, `app/meeting/create.tsx`

### App screens & inner routes

**Tab:** `app/(tabs)/meetings.tsx` → Upcoming / Completed / Cancelled segments

**Inner screens**
| Route | File | APIs to wire |
|-------|------|--------------|
| `/meeting/[id]` | `app/meeting/[id].tsx` | Detail, Recordings, Cancel, LiveKit token |
| `/meeting/create` | `app/meeting/create.tsx` | Create, Patch / Reschedule |

**Service:** `services/meetings.ts` (planned)

### How to use in the mobile app
- Meetings tab loads three lists: **List - Upcoming**, **List - Completed**, **List - Cancelled**.
- Tap meeting → **Detail** on `meeting/[id].tsx`.
- Schedule → **Create** from `meeting/create.tsx`; edit → **Patch / Reschedule**.
- Cancel from list → **Cancel (PATCH status)**; recordings section → **Recordings for Meeting**.

### Postman testing
- Run **List - Upcoming** to copy a `meetingId` into variables.
- Use **Detail** before **Patch** or **Cancel** to inspect current state.

### APIs in this folder

| Request | API | App screen | When to call | Backend handler | What it does |

| List - Upcoming | `GET /internal-meetings` | /(tabs)/meetings (app/(tabs)/meetings.tsx) | Meetings tab mount; Upcoming segment selected; pull-to-refresh | `internalMeetingController.list` | Paginated internal meetings filtered to scheduled/upcoming. |
| List - Completed | `GET /internal-meetings` | /(tabs)/meetings (app/(tabs)/meetings.tsx) | User switches to Completed segment | `internalMeetingController.list` | Same list endpoint filtered to ended meetings. |
| List - Cancelled | `GET /internal-meetings` | /(tabs)/meetings (app/(tabs)/meetings.tsx) | User switches to Cancelled segment | `internalMeetingController.list` | Same list endpoint filtered to cancelled meetings. |
| Detail | `GET /internal-meetings/{{meetingId}}` | /meeting/[id] (app/meeting/[id].tsx) | User taps a meeting row from any list | `internalMeetingController.get` | Returns one internal meeting by Mongo _id (includes LiveKit room name). |
| Create | `POST /internal-meetings` | /meeting/create (app/meeting/create.tsx) | User submits Schedule form (FAB or header +) | `internalMeetingController.create` | Creates an internal meeting, assigns LiveKit room, sends invitation emails. |
| Patch / Reschedule | `PATCH /internal-meetings/{{meetingId}}` | /meeting/create (app/meeting/create.tsx) | Edit existing meeting and save | `internalMeetingController.update` | Updates meeting fields (title, schedule, hosts, status, etc.). |
| Cancel (PATCH status) | `PATCH /internal-meetings/{{meetingId}}` | /(tabs)/meetings \| /meeting/[id] (app/(tabs)/meetings.tsx, app/meeting/[id].tsx) | User confirms Cancel on meeting card or detail | `internalMeetingController.update` | Cancels a meeting by setting status to cancelled. |
| Delete | `DELETE /internal-meetings/{{meetingId}}` | (none) (—) | Permanent delete (admin action — no mobile UI yet) | `internalMeetingController.remove` | Permanently deletes an internal meeting and tears down its LiveKit room. |
| Resend Invites | `POST /internal-meetings/{{meetingId}}/resend-invitations` | /meeting/[id] (app/meeting/[id].tsx) | Resend button on detail (planned) | `internalMeetingController.resendInvitations` | Re-sends invitation emails/notifications to meeting invitees. |
| Recordings for Meeting | `GET /internal-meetings/{{meetingId}}/recordings` | /meeting/[id] (app/meeting/[id].tsx) | Detail screen loads recording section | `internalMeetingController.getRecordings` | Lists recordings associated with a specific internal meeting. |

item.description:
## 5. LiveKit

Real-time A/V rooms powered by LiveKit. Tokens are short-lived; fetch immediately before joining.

**Mobile tab:** Meetings + Chats (calls)
**App routes:** `app/meeting/[id].tsx` (join meeting), `app/chat/[id].tsx`, `app/call/new.tsx`

### App screens & inner routes

Called from meeting and chat flows (not a separate tab).

| Trigger screen | When |
|----------------|------|
| `app/meeting/[id].tsx` | User taps **Join Meeting** |
| `app/chat/[id].tsx`, `app/call/new.tsx` | Start audio/video call |

**Service:** `services/livekit.ts` (planned)

### How to use in the mobile app
- Join scheduled meeting → **Token - Meeting** with `meetingId` → open LiveKit room UI.
- Start chat call → **Token - Chat Call** with conversation/participant context.
- Optional: **Recording - Start/Stop/Status** during active room (UI not built yet).

### Postman testing
- Requires valid `meetingId` or chat context from folders 4 / 8.
- Token response is used client-side only — do not log in production.

### APIs in this folder

| Request | API | App screen | When to call | Backend handler | What it does |
|---------|-----|------------|--------------|-----------------|--------------|
| Token - Meeting | `POST /livekit/token` | /meeting/[id] (app/meeting/[id].tsx) | User taps **Join Meeting** on detail | `livekitController.getToken` | Mints a LiveKit JWT for joining a meeting room with host/guest permissions. |
| Token - Chat Call | `POST /livekit/token` | /chat/[id] \| /call/new (app/chat/[id].tsx, app/call/new.tsx) | Start audio/video from chat or new call screen | `livekitController.getToken` | Same token endpoint; for chat P2P rooms verifies conversation membership. |
| Recording - Start | `POST /livekit/recording/start` | In-call room UI (planned) (components/livekit-room.tsx (planned)) | Host taps Record during meeting | `livekitController.startRecording` | Starts LiveKit egress recording for a room (host-only at controller level). |
| Recording - Stop | `POST /livekit/recording/stop` | In-call room UI (planned) (components/livekit-room.tsx (planned)) | Host stops recording | `livekitController.stopRecording` | Stops an active LiveKit recording egress. |
| Recording - Status | `GET /livekit/recording/status/{{meetingRoomName}}` | In-call room UI (planned) (components/livekit-room.tsx (planned)) | Poll while recording active | `livekitController.getRecordingStatus` | Returns current recording/egress status for a LiveKit room. |

### Backend route files
- `src/routes/v1/livekit.route.js`
